dict.string: OpenHuman uses the microphone for voice dictation and for voice/video calls and huddles inside embedded apps (Google Meet, Discord, Slack).
OpenHuman uses the camera for video calls and huddles inside embedded apps (Google Meet, Discord, Slack).
OpenHuman reads your contacts to recognize the people in your messages and calendar, and to resolve handles like emails and phone numbers to real people.
OpenHuman reads your calendar to understand your schedule and surface what matters across your day.
OpenHuman creates reminders to help you follow up on the people and commitments that matter.
